plant.description: Dried flower buds of an aromatic tree.

ayurvedic_properties.virya_potency: Sheeta (Cooling) - Note: Cloves are uniquely cooling despite being pungent.

method_1.method: Clove tea or direct application of oil to gums.

safety_profile.warning: Clove oil is very strong; dilute before skin contact.
safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.
